project_metadata.description: A premium kitchenware digital catalog website for 'NC Nandini Collections' that showcases the product line, enables instant WhatsApp inquiries, and supports protected admin management of inventory, all presented in a minimalist, gold-accented ultra-modern design.
project_metadata.core_purpose: An always up-to-date luxury digital catalog for NC Nandini Collections kitchenware, with instant WhatsApp inquiry and secure admin product management.
project_metadata.target_audience: Discerning kitchenware buyers, luxury home shoppers, boutique retailers, and showroom customers in Nizamabad and Telangana
key_features: Full digital catalog with gold-accented, white minimalist theme
WhatsApp inquiry CTA on every product
Protected admin dashboard for product/category management
Sticky header, multi-column dark gold-accented footer

pages.purpose: Brand landing, instant products showcase, origin story, and quick contact for premium kitchenware catalog.
pages.description: Landing page combining high-impact hero, featured products, brand/about, and contact touchpoints. All sections stack vertically, wide white space, brand gold accents. Responsive grid layouts. Login available from header; Modal overlays for auth. Ensures mobile elegance — test all viewports.
pages.content_notes: Header uses brand logo left, nav links centered, Login button right which opens LoginModal (modal, not page); when logged in, shows user circle and 'Logout' in menu. Home hero headline: 'NC Nandini Collections - Premium Kitchenware from Namdevwada, Nizamabad'. FeaturedProductsGrid displays up to 4 products marked is_featured. AboutSection details brand roots and location. ContactForm has no submission button, only displays WhatsApp/phone/address/mail. Footer: always present. LoginModal opens from Login in Header. After login, admin can navigate to dashboard via header user menu dropdown.

pages.purpose: Full browse and WhatsApp connect for all catalog items, filterable by category as needed.
pages.description: Comprehensive product listing page with responsive grid (2 across mobile, 4 desktop), gold accenting, white card layouts, inset WhatsApp inquiry buttons. Ensures full visual consistency. Fast loading & asynchronous product display.
pages.content_notes: ProductGrid displays all products, 2 columns on mobile, up to 4 desktop. Each button opens WhatsApp inquiry (wa.me/918008890044) with prefilled product message. Header/Footer present. Login button opens LoginModal. No category filter UI unless more than one category exists. If logged in, admin badge appears in header user menu (links to AdminDashboard).

pages.purpose: Focus on one premium product for inquiry, with rich image and info.
pages.description: Detailed product presentation; gold & white luxury feel. Inquiry button launches WhatsApp intent with prefilled product name. Responsive two-column converts to single-stack on mobile. Closed appearance, strong product focus, minimal nav noise.
pages.content_notes: Single product displayed in ProductDetailCard (image left, fields right, on mobile stacks). WhatsApp inquiry prepopulates product name in message. Header/Footer present as shell. If user not admin, no edit option. LoginModal available from header if logged out.

pages.purpose: Brand identity storytelling and showroom location info.
pages.description: Details the NC Nandini Collections brand, origin, luxury ethos and location. Immersive gold, clean white, and weighted text presentation. All info sectioned for fast reading. Mobile-optimized for readability.
pages.content_notes: AboutSection reused here (brand story, why premium, address/location). Header/Footer present. No form, just info. On mobile, section stacks leading story atop brand location/details. LoginModal available from header.

pages.purpose: Allow authenticated admin to add, edit, or delete products and categories. Full inventory management. Highly restricted access.
pages.description: Admin dashboard to manage (CRUD) products and categories. Uses clean light card/grid UI, with admin-only edit features. Strict access: email/password only. Fast modals and inline feedback for all actions.
pages.content_notes: Protected. Redirects to LoginModal if not authenticated. AdminProductList shows all products, can sort by category/featured. AddEditProductForm launches as right-drawer modal for edits or add. ManageCategoriesPanel sits below (or in modal). No external links; WhatsApp buttons removed. Header visible, shows user menu (logout option). Darker background than main site for admin feel. Footer present.

theme.design_dna: Ultra-modern, minimalist, Raleway for text, gold accent on pure white, dark footer, pill-shaped buttons, soft drop shadows on product cards, responsive grid layouts. Minimal iconography. Premium, high-contrast, no visual noise, all touch targets mobile-optimized.
theme.animation_style: Framer Motion fade/slide transitions, gold hover glows, modal popovers
theme.interaction_style: Minimal, pill-shaped highlights, elegant focus rings in gold, animation only on entry/hover/popup. All buttons touch-sized.

components.description: Top sticky header bar with the brand logo at left (vector/transparent), horizontal minimalist nav links (Raleway semibold, gold hover underline, uppercase), Login button at right (gold-outlined pill, bold, shows Login modal or triggers navigation), dark text. Responsive: hamburger collapses links on mobile. After login, Login is replaced by User avatar menu (mini circle with light border, gold ring, initials).
components.purpose: Main navigation and authentication triggers. Sticky at scroll top, handles user login/logout. Opacity transition on scroll.

components.description: Full-width, high-contrast hero section. Clean white background, Raleway bold headline (2xl-4xl), tagline, gold gradient accent underline, full-bleed hero product image (premium cookware set, slight elevation with gold-edged drop shadow). Two primary buttons: 'Browse Collection' (gold filled, calls /catalog), 'Contact Us' (subtle gold border, scrolls to ContactForm). Spaced padding, mobile stacking.
components.purpose: Brand impact on homepage with CTA to catalog and contact.

components.description: Responsive grid (min 2 columns on mobile, up to 4 on desktop) displaying 4 featured products. Each product card: pure white tile, rounded-lg border, gold accent line at base, soft shadow, product image (centered, aspect-ratio box), Raleway medium, product name, gold price text (xl, right). 'Inquire on WhatsApp' gold-filled button below; opens wa.me link with prefilled text. Smooth hover shadow/scale. Grid auto-fills based on is_featured flag.
components.purpose: Showcase up to 4 featured products with quick WhatsApp inquiry.

components.description: Horizontally stacked section: left - brand story, right - rich photo of showroom/kitchenware luxury. Title (bold, gold accent letter), Raleway lighter for body. Gold divider bar under heading. Responsive: stacks vertical on mobile. Location/subtext displayed below. No border, generous white space.
components.purpose: Convey brand ethos, story, and location prominently.

components.description: Compact contact section with dark rounded card overlay on white. Text: 'Contact Us', phone icon & number (8008890044, gold), WhatsApp icon button opens wa.me link, address (Raleway, smallcaps), mailto link (brand email, gold on hover). No form submission; focuses on informational/inquiry links. Spaced elements, touch-friendly. Responsive: stacks neatly on mobile.
components.purpose: Provide direct phone, location and WhatsApp contact access.

components.description: Product catalog grid: min 2 columns on mobile, 3-4 desktop. Card: white tile, rounded corners, soft shadow, gold vertical accent bar at left, image (fixed aspect), name/title below, short description, gold price right-aligned. 'Inquire on WhatsApp' gold-outlined pill button at base. Responsive: increases columns on larger screens, even spacing.
components.purpose: Display all products in catalog, filter by category if needed.

components.description: Single product showcase. Left: large product image (max-width, border radius, gold drop shadow). Right: product name (xl, bold, Raleway), gold price, description (Raleway regular). Gold badge for category. Prominent gold 'Inquire on WhatsApp' button (full-width on mobile). Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile, 2-column on desktop. Card floats on white with shadow.
components.purpose: Detailed view and fast WhatsApp inquiry for a selected product.

components.description: List view of all products for admins. Columns: Thumb (mini image), Name, Category, Price, Featured (toggle icon), Edit (pencil icon), Delete (trash icon, gold). Header row with subtle gold bottom line. Paginated if product count is large. Actions use modals. White cards, light dark-on-white UI, highlight selected row gold. Inline action feedback (e.g., fade, loading spinners).
components.purpose: Admin panel to manage the product inventory efficiently.

components.description: Drawer modal (right slide-in) or page section for add/edit product. Fields: Name (input), Description (textarea), Price (input, gold prefix), Category (dropdown, gold highlight), Image (upload - JPEG/PNG/WEBP, gold border drop area, preview), Featured (switch). Validates required fields, highlights errors in gold. Confirm/Cancel buttons (pill, gold filled/border respectively). Responsive: full width on mobile.
components.purpose: Admin interface to add or edit product entries.

components.description: Panel/modal listing all categories (white list, gold pill 'Add', edit pencil, delete trash, error warns if deleting in-use category). Lightweight, inline add/edit, gold focus rings. Responsive: stacks on mobile, compact table on desktop.
components.purpose: Admin CRUD for product categories only.

components.description: Centered overlay modal with gold-detailed white card, rounded corners, subtle drop shadow, gold NC logo atop. Fields: email (input), password (input), gold filled login button, error text in gold. Triggered from Login button (logged out) in Header. Closes on backdrop click or ESC. Responsive mobile-friendly sizing. On successful login, closes modal and updates Header state.
components.purpose: Authenticate admin users for protected content access.

components.description: Full-width, dark background (#212121), 3-column flex layout: left - logo & tagline, center - nav links (gold upon hover, uppercase smallcaps), right - social icons (Instagram, YouTube, WhatsApp, large, gold fill, hover glow). Gold horizontal divider. Brand info and year below in gold text. Responsive: stacks on mobile, icon touch zones enlarged.
components.purpose: Branding and universal navigation/info at base of every page.

layout.spacing: lg (py-6, px-4 on mobile, px-12 desktop)

apis.purpose: Retrieve all products for catalog grid and featured display.
apis.response: [{id, name, description, price, category_id, image_url, is_featured, created_at, updated_at}]

apis.purpose: Get product details by id for product detail page.
apis.response: {id, name, description, price, category_id, image_url, is_featured, created_at, updated_at}
{id, name, description, price, category_id, image_url, is_featured, created_at, updated_at}

apis.purpose: Admin updates a product by id (protected).
apis.response: {id, name, description, price, category_id, image_url, is_featured, created_at, updated_at}

apis.purpose: Admin deletes a product by id (protected).
Get all product categories for filtering and management.

frontend.styling: Tailwind v4 with custom gold palette + Raleway font

backend.database: PostgreSQL, tables: products, categories, users (already exists)
